headline: 🔴 TSLA -3.1% pre-market after Q1 earnings call: Musk's $25B capex guidance overshadows EPS beat — stock jumped +4% AH on results, then erased gains as investors balked at spending ramp
Musk on earnings call: New Roadster could debut 'in a month or so' — first concrete timeline signal in years; unexpected acceleration from 2027 to possible Q2/Q3 2026 reveal
Musk: Optimus unveil pushed to 'late July, August time frame' — competitors 'do a frame-by-frame analysis and copy everything we're doing'; stealth mode until closer to production
Musk targets unsupervised FSD in 'a dozen or so states' by year-end 2026; says 'wouldn't be right to go to large FSD scale when safety can still improve'
Tesla Q1 2026 BEAT: Revenue $22.38B (+16% YoY), non-GAAP EPS $0.41 (+52% YoY) vs $0.37 est, gross margin 21.1% (+478 bps YoY), FCF $1.4B (+117% YoY) — strongest margins in years
⚠️ Tesla quietly slips 5-city robotaxi 1H 2026 timelines — Phoenix, Miami, Orlando, Tampa, Las Vegas now 'preparations underway' with no firm date; only Dallas + Houston confirmed live
source: Electrek / Business Insider / Tesla Q1 Deck

headline: Tesla files permits for first robotaxi-only Supercharger stations in Arizona — dedicated V4 fleet charging hubs for Cybercab fleet; first physical autonomous fleet infrastructure in Waymo's home territory

Samsung Taylor Texas 2nm fab kicks off equipment installation April 24 — AI5 chip manufacturing milestone; $16.5B Tesla deal; 2nm yields in high-50% range; volume production 2027 for Optimus + supercomputer clusters
